/cwe/weakness/924.Name: Improper Enforcement of Message Integrity During Transmission in a Communication Channel
/cwe/weakness/924.Description: The product establishes a communication channel with an endpoint and receives a message from that endpoint, but it does not sufficiently ensure that the message was not modified during transmission.
/cwe/weakness/924.ExtendedDescription: Attackers might be able to modify the message and spoof the endpoint by interfering with the data as it crosses the network or by redirecting the connection to a system under their control.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: REALIZATION: This weakness is caused during implementation of an architectural security tactic.

CommonConsequences.Note: If an attackers can spoof the endpoint, the attacker gains all the privileges that were intended for the original endpoint.
